case_title: FERRAIUOLO THOMAS DBA SERPENTILE VS MARBLE MASTERS INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,867.26 FILED BY FERRAIUOLO THOMAS DBA SERPENTILE AS TO DEFENDANT MARBLE MASTERS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-22-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
